name: @clawguard/openclaw-plugin
description: Real-time security monitoring for OpenClaw agents — detects risky behavior and sends Telegram alerts

apiKey.description: Your ClawGuard API key (starts with cg_)

blockSensitiveAccess.description: Block access to sensitive files (.env, credentials, SSH keys)

requireApprovalForHighRisk.description: Require user approval before potential data exfiltration
